_request_preview: [turn-2] How much will I owe for a $3,000 procedure on my Bronze plan?
content: Your Bronze deductible is already met, so your $3,000 procedure is subject to 40% coinsurance, which would normally be $1,200. However, you have only $200 left before hitting your $8,000 out-of-pocket maximum, so your out-of-pocket maximum caps your cost at **$200**, and the plan pays the remaining **$2,800**.
